title: Weak Authentication Mechanism
description: The system lacks documented authentication and authorization mechanisms, relying potentially on default configurations or weak passwords. This allows attackers to impersonate legitimate users or services, gaining unauthorized access to the system and its data.  The absence of multi-factor authentication (MFA) significantly amplifies this risk.
attack_vector: Brute-force attacks, credential stuffing, password cracking, exploiting default credentials, social engineering.
mitigations: Implement strong password policies (length, complexity, rotation).
Enforce Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) for all users.
Regularly audit user accounts and permissions; disable inactive accounts.
